description.value:
This jutsu cannot be cast while benefitting from the Hylia Clan A-Ranks for the Power or Wisdom paths.

The seal embedded within your palm begins to resonante with a golden-green glow, enveloping your body. Runes appear all over your body and clothes, magnifying your strength and resilience. Your weapon is also transformed into a tool of mass destruction. You gain the following benefits; Once this jutsu ends, you gain 2 ranks of Exhaustion and 2 ranks of Slowed.

  • You become large in size.
  • You gain 30 feet of true sight, and 60 feet of blindsight.
  • Your Constitution and Taijutsu ability score become 24.
  • You gain a number of temporary hit points equal to twice your level. While you have these temporary hit points, you have resistance to all damage.
  • When you make an attack roll, skill check, or saving throw, twice per round you may spend 5 chakra to make the roll at advantage.
  • If a creature makes an attack of opportunity against you, you can immediately take the attack action.
  • You gain an additional reaction per turn. This reaction can only be used to defend yourself or an allied creature.
  • Allies (other than you) within 15 feet of you, may add a +1d6 bonus to any attack roll or saving throw they make, once per turn. You may impose a -1d4 penalty to one attack roll or saving throw a hostile creature makes, once per turn, so long as they are within the same range.
  • The bonus to damage rolls you possess from your Blessing of Courage feature against specific adversary types can trigger any number of times per turn, and ignores half of any DR.

  • Lastly, your weapon is transformed into a large version of itself with a double helix design. Your weapon gains a +1 to attack and damage rolls, and critical threat range. Depending on whether your weapon is a melee or ranged weapon, it gains the following ability;
      Melee: Twice per turn, when you make a weapon attack with your weapon, you can spend 3 chakra to launch a 10-foot wide white beam of energy originating from you in a 30-foot line. All hostile creatures caught within this line must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking your weapon's damage on a failure.
      Ranged: Twice per turn, when you make a weapon attack with your weapon, you can spend 3 chakra to release a pulse of white energy from where your shot lands in a 20-foot radius. All hostile creatures within range must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking your weapon's damage on failure.
